case_title: CHU, RICKY VS BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL

docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27725, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHU, RICKY AS TO DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2004 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU, RICKY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL $1,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,822.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU, RICKY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRANNAN, ALLAN PAUL JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27725 ON DECEMBER 03, 2004 EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS. JUDT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF ALLAN PAUL BRANNAN-APPELLANT & AGAINST RICKY CHU-RESPONDENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
